Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Fred Keeperman, Esq. for Plaintiff: Carroll, Burdick & McDonough, LLP.
Plaintiff's witness: Michael Latiff, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented and declarations in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Danny Vu and Green Forest, LLC. as follows:
Damages $110,457.91
Prejudgment Interest $15,402.34
Costs $382.50 for a total of $126,242.75
Judgment signed in open court.
